title: Shipping Policy
description: WholesaleVapesUSA shipping policy covering processing time, domestic and international delivery expectations, compliance requirements, and tracking guidance.

sections.title: 1. Processing Time
paragraphs: Wholesale orders are typically reviewed, verified, and prepared within 24 to 48 hours on business days after payment confirmation.
During high-volume periods or compliance hold checks, processing can take longer. If timing changes, our team will notify you by email.

sections.title: 2. Domestic Shipping
paragraphs: We ship across eligible US regions using carrier options that match destination requirements and compliance rules.
Estimated transit windows vary by region: nearby zones usually arrive faster, while longer-distance routes can take additional business days.
bullets: Northeast and Southeast: commonly 2 to 4 business days after dispatch
Midwest and South Central: commonly 3 to 5 business days after dispatch
West Coast and remote regions: commonly 4 to 7 business days after dispatch

sections.title: 3. International Shipping
paragraphs: International availability depends on destination regulations, carrier serviceability, and product restrictions.
Contact support before ordering for country-specific guidance on permissible product categories and expected delivery windows.

sections.title: 4. PACT Act Compliance
paragraphs: All applicable shipments follow federal and state compliance requirements, including adult-signature workflows and required reporting obligations where applicable.
Orders that do not satisfy compliance checks may be delayed, modified, or canceled.

sections.title: 5. Restricted States and Products
paragraphs: Some product categories may be restricted in specific states or local jurisdictions.
Customers are responsible for understanding local rules before ordering. Orders that conflict with destination law cannot be fulfilled.
bullets: THC-related products are limited to jurisdictions where sale and shipment are permitted
Nicotine and vape category restrictions vary by state and municipality
Adult signature and verification remain mandatory for age-restricted products

sections.title: 6. Tracking and Delivery Updates
paragraphs: Tracking details are sent once your order is dispatched. Use the provided carrier link to monitor shipment milestones and delivery progress.
If a package is delayed, returned, or undeliverable, contact support@wholesalevapesusa.com with your order details for assistance.

title: Legality, Compliance & Safety
description: WholesaleVapesUSA legality and safety guidance: 2018 Farm Bill hemp limits, 21+ wholesale registration with AgeChecker.net, product warnings, and shipping timelines including international customs.

sections.title: Compliance — hemp‑derived products
paragraphs: All products on this site are derived from industrial hemp and contain less than 0.3% Delta‑9 THC in accordance with the 2018 Farm Bill. Regulations vary by jurisdiction; buyers remain responsible for confirming local rules before ordering.

sections.title: Age restriction
paragraphs: You must be 21 or older to purchase. We utilize AgeChecker.net for wholesale registrations to support compliant adult‑only B2B commerce.

sections.title: Warnings
paragraphs: Vaping products may contain nicotine, a highly addictive chemical. Cannabinoid products are intended for adult use only. Do not use if pregnant or nursing. Consult a physician before use.

sections.title: 48‑hour shipping
paragraphs: The delivery window begins once the order is processed. International delivery times may vary based on local customs, carrier service, and destination regulations.
